reviews.author: Jeff H.
reviews.text: I'm thrilled with the incredible transformation Morales Landscaping brought to my property! His team demonstrated professionalism, creativity, and attention to detail.
reviews.notes: Thumbtack profile surfaced snippet with '...' between 'property!' and 'professionalism' — may be an excerpt. Preserved as shown.

reviews.author: Ginny B.
reviews.text: Jose was wonderful. Prompt and very timely at responding... His quality of work after my project was done was outstanding.

reviews.author: Marisa P.
reviews.text: Jose was responsive, professional and did great work. Hardscaping project... went as planned and in a timely manner.

reviews.author: Brittany W.
reviews.date: recent (4 weeks ago from capture date)
reviews.text: Great communication and fair pricing they leveled my yard for the kids pools and laid grass seed.

counts.total_available: 26 Thumbtack reviews + unknown Google/Yelp count (Yelp listing blocked, GBP URL not available)

notes: Morales Landscape & Construction (MLC). Owner Jose Morales, 6 years in business (founded ~2019-2020), 5-person crew, 34 times hired on Thumbtack. Broad service scope: landscaping design + hardscaping + sod/irrigation/tree work + stump grinding + patios + excavation + junk removal. 4 verbatim reviews captured from Thumbtack. Jose personally named in 3 of 4 reviews. Meets 1-pass trigger (captured >= 3) per HANDOFF-CONTRACT §3, but HTML build deferred to dedicated pass-3 iteration.
